resources.string:
Demonstrates how to use different types of video sources for playback:
• URL: Play videos via direct URL
• VidAuth: Play videos via VID and PlayAuth
• VidSts: Play videos via VID and STS token

After selecting a video source type, if the configuration is incomplete, you will be guided to the settings page to configure it.
Video source configuration is incomplete. Please go to the settings page to configure
